action.reasoning: Observation: debug_predict.py on val shows model predicts bbox tokens correctly but IoU very low (0.0-0.12). Mean IoU across val likely ~0.05. Previous training used only 500 samples, 1 epoch, insufficient for generalization. Analysis: need larger training set and longer training to improve spatial accuracy. Decision: expand training to 3000 samples, 3 epochs, higher LoRA rank (16), more target modules. Then merge, evaluate on val set to see if mean_iou improves, and if >0.1, submit eval. Time budget accommodates ~2.75h training.
